comment: Open-data source registry for the Drug Price Observatory pipeline. automation: 'auto' = fetched and transformed by run.mjs with no credentials; 'api-key' = automatable once a free key is configured; 'manual' = one download or copy step per release cycle, then the listed converter handles it.

sources.name: UNODC World Drug Report 2025 — Annex 8.1 Prices and purities
sources.cadence: annual (June, with each WDR edition — bump the URL year)

sources.name: UNODC World Drug Report 2025 — Annex 7.1 Drug seizures 2019-2023
sources.cadence: annual (June — bump the URL year and filename)

sources.name: UNODC WDR 2025 — Annex 8.3 Price time series Western Europe & USA (1990-)
sources.feeds: NOT YET INTEGRATED — long-run price trend view (30+ year series)
sources.transform: TODO: new converter + a long-series chart in Explorer

sources.name: UNODC WDR 2025 — Annex 6.2.1/6.2.2 Opium poppy cultivation & production
sources.feeds: NOT YET INTEGRATED — national context for Myanmar Focus (state-level detail comes from the opium survey below)

sources.name: Natural Earth 10m admin-0 countries, India-POV variant
sources.cadence: rarely (NE releases); re-run only on boundary updates

sources.name: ACLED conflict events — Myanmar
sources.license: free registration for non-commercial research use (acleddata.com/register); attribution required
sources.feeds: mmConflictEvents (Myanmar Focus + intelligence layer) — replaces illustrative conflict data
sources.transform: TODO: scripts/convert/acled-to-mm-conflict.mjs (admin1 -> app region ids, fatalities -> intensity)

sources.name: UNODC Myanmar Opium Survey (state/region cultivation estimates)
sources.feeds: mmRegionRecords opiumHa (Myanmar Focus) — replaces illustrative cultivation figures
sources.transform: scripts/convert/from-pdf.mjs (existing PDF table extractor), then the mmRegionRecords CSV schema

sources.name: UNODC Synthetic Drugs in East and Southeast Asia (annual report)
sources.format: pdf (tables: meth seizures, prices, precursor cases by country)
sources.feeds: mmFlowRecords / precursor context for Myanmar Focus

sources.name: INCB Precursors Annual Report (seizure/shipment tables)
sources.feeds: FLOW_RECORDS + PRECURSOR_PRICE_RECORDS (Precursor Flows tab) — replaces illustrative corridors
sources.transform: scripts/convert/from-pdf.mjs, corridor rows via the flows CSV schema

sources.name: EUDA (ex-EMCDDA) European price, purity and seizures tables
sources.format: xlsx per table (stable landing page, table URLs change yearly)
sources.feeds: European enrichment for prices.ts (purity-adjusted view gets much denser)

sources.name: UNODC Individual Drug Seizures (IDS) microdata — origin/destination per seizure
sources.license: UN; registration required for microdata exports
sources.feeds: THE upgrade path for real corridor arcs (origin -> transit -> destination at event grain)
sources.transform: TODO once export access is granted — aggregate to corridor/year before bundling (ethical grain guard)

sources.name: Global Organized Crime Index (GI-TOC) country scores
sources.feeds: NOT YET INTEGRATED — candidate context layer (criminality/resilience scores beside seizure data); also a relationship signal for the GI-TOC grant track
